assessment_meta.notes: Real manual screen using listing evidence plus limited public planning-context checks. Conservative placeholders retained where authoritative site-report fields were not fully verified in-session.

site.access_notes: Two driveways and double lockup garage noted in listing, which is positive at screen level. Exact frontage/access geometry and subdivision access practicality remain unverified.

residential_subdivision_use_case.notes: Target use case matches MVP scope. Site is within the candidate test set for residential subdivision screening.

current_zone.notes: Current zone not verified from authoritative council mapping/site report in this pass.

local_plan_precinct.plan_name: Nambour local plan area likely relevant
local_plan_precinct.notes: Nambour local plan context is likely relevant but exact precinct/site-specific local plan mapping was not verified in this pass.

minimum_lot_size.notes: Minimum lot size or equivalent subdivision threshold not verified from authoritative planning controls.

effective_yield.notes: 756sqm is materially stronger than a smaller suburban lot and two driveways may help access flexibility, but without zoning, frontage, servicing and minimum lot size confirmation no reliable indicative lot count should be asserted.

frontage_access.notes: Two driveways are a positive signal for access flexibility, but exact frontage and legal/practical access arrangement are not yet verified.

flood.notes: Flood status not verified from authoritative mapping in this pass.

steep_land_landslide.notes: Steep land / landslide overlays not verified from authoritative mapping in this pass.

biodiversity_waterways.notes: Biodiversity / waterway constraints not verified from authoritative mapping in this pass.

prior_application_history.notes: Prior application history not checked in Development.i / PD Online equivalent during this pass.

critical_unknowns: Minimum lot size / subdivision threshold not verified
Steep land / landslide status not checked
next_actions: Obtain authoritative site report or council mapping output for zoning and local plan / precinct
Verify minimum lot size and any frontage requirements from applicable planning controls
Check flood, steep land / landslide, and biodiversity / waterways overlays
Check prior development application history for the site
Confirm whether the dual-driveway arrangement materially improves subdivision access practicality
